rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.enterScoresMessage: Enter scores in the play sheet to see rankings here!
rankings.shareText: Here are the results from our game!
rankings.saveValidationMessage: To save game, fill in missing setup information. Click on the setup icon at the top right.
rankings.coinTieBreakerDisclaimer: For accurate tie-breaking, switch Treasury Scoring to 'Coins' in Settings.
rankings.winnerDecidedByCoins: The winner is decided by coins due to a tie in points.
rankings.csvImportTip: Tip: This text or CSV can be imported into another user's app in Settings!
rankings.viewHistorySettings: You can look up your game history in Settings.

hallOfFame.title: Hall of Fame
hallOfFame.noRecords: No records found for the selected expansions.

gameModes.title: GAME MODES
gameModes.purchasePrompt: $2 USD to unlock all four expansions
gameModes.breakTheRulesDesc1: 7 Wonders is designed for up to 7 players, but this app removes those limits. You can add as many players as you want, select any combination of expansions, and even play with duplicate wonders.
gameModes.breakTheRulesDesc2: The scoring logic remains solid for all player counts, but be prepared for some chaotic (and exciting) games if you push the boundaries!
gameModes.note: Note: Certain expansion combinations may require additional table space and can significantly increase play time.
gameModes.hiddenGamesMessage_one: {{count}} game hidden from Hall of Fame, Leaderboard, Player History, Game Statistics, and Game History because it includes an expansion which you have not purchased.
gameModes.hiddenGamesMessage_other: {{count}} games hidden from Hall of Fame, Leaderboard, Player History, Game Statistics, and Game History because they include expansions which you have not purchased.
gameModes.hiddenGamesPurchaseLink_one: Purchase the expansions to access the hidden game
gameModes.hiddenGamesPurchaseLink_other: Purchase the expansions to access the hidden games
gameModes.hiddenGamesMessageLong: {{count}} games in your history don't match the current game mode filters.
gameModes.armadaDesc: Naval conflicts and island exploration. Includes naval boards for each player.
gameModes.citiesDesc: Intercity debt and shadowy interaction. Adds new 'Black' city cards.
gameModes.edificeDesc: Communal projects that players build together for rewards or global penalties.
gameModes.leadersDesc: Recruit powerful historical figures to guide your civilization's strategy.
gameModes.teamPlayDesc: Play in teams to pool scores and coordinate strategies.
gameModes.unlockAllWondersDesc: Enable all wonders from every expansion regardless of selected modes.

base.name: Base Game
base.description: The classic experience. Focus on your city and immediate neighbors.

leadersMode.name: Leaders Expansion
leadersMode.description: Recruit influential figures to guide your civilization's growth.

citiesMode.name: Cities Expansion
citiesMode.description: Shadowy dealings and increased interaction with new Black cards.

armadaMode.name: Armada Expansion
armadaMode.description: Take to the high seas with naval tracks and island exploration.

edificeMode.name: Edifice Expansion
edificeMode.description: Work together on communal projects for rewards or global penalties.

zenith.name: The Zenith Collection
zenith.description: All expansions active. The ultimate test of ancient strategy.

diplomatic.name: The Diplomatic Court
diplomatic.description: Powerful leaders meet the gritty streets of the metropolis.

sovereign.name: Sovereign Oceans
sovereign.description: Great leaders conquer the seas with powerful fleets.

monumental.name: Monumental Rulers
monumental.description: Legendary figures collaborate on massive communal structures.

navalTrade.name: Naval Trade Routes
navalTrade.description: Mercantile cities and naval power dominate ancient commerce.

metropolitan.name: Metropolitan Wonders
metropolitan.description: Dense cities pooling resources for grand communal edifices.

coastal.name: Coastal Landmarks
coastal.description: Collaborative building projects along the strategic coastlines.

imperial.name: The Imperial Triumvirate
imperial.description: Leaders, Cities, and Armada. High interaction, naval warfare, and recruitment.

masterArchitects.name: The Master Architects
masterArchitects.description: Leaders, Cities, and Edifice. Focus on recruitment and collaborative building.

royalArchitects.name: The Royal Architects
royalArchitects.description: Leaders, Armada, and Edifice. Legendary leaders expanding sea and structure.

coalition.name: The Coalition of Might
coalition.description: Cities, Armada, and Edifice. Pure strategy, warfare, and construction.

app.validationError: Cannot save game. Please ensure all players have a custom name, wonder, and side selected:
app.backupFailed: Failed to save backup to Google Drive: {{error}}
app.restoreConfirm: This will merge data from Google Drive with your local data, avoiding duplicates. Continue?
app.googleDriveDisconnected: Google Drive disconnected. Sign in to resume backup?

purchase.nativeMessage: Unlock all 4 expansions (Leaders, Cities, Armada, Edifice) with a 7-day free trial, then a one-time purchase.
purchase.webMessage: Upgrade to 'Pro Version - Four Expansions' (Leaders, Cities, Armada, Edifice) for a one-time fee of $2.00?
